---
title: "Bronx Science Symposium"
description: "Lyla and Ormary shared their research at the Bronx Science Symposium."
date: 2026-01-17
toc: true
---

Our lab  attended the Bronx Science Symposium, where Lyla and Ormary presented their work to students, researchers, and other visitors. This was a wonderful opportunity to share our research, connect with others, and celebrate the progress of our team.

You can use this space to tell people more about what happened during the event, who attended, what stood out, and what the team learned.

## Photos from the event

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Ormary presenting her work](images/IMG_9989){width="300px" fig-align="center"}){fig-alt="Ormary presenting her work" fig-cap="Ormary presenting her work on ovule development in the 'living fossil' *Wollemia* (Araucariaceae)."}

![Lyla presenting her work](images/IMG_9985 2){width="300px" fig-align="center"}){fig-alt="Lyla presenting her work" fig-cap="Lyla presenting her work on the morphological study of the unusual flowers of *Chloranthus* spicatus."}
:::
